How Trainiq Works

Three simple steps to get fit with AI

01

Message on WhatsApp

Tell us your fitness goals, experience level, and available equipment.

02

AI Creates Your Plan

GPT-4 generates personalized workouts and diet recommendations.

03

Daily Workouts Delivered

Receive your routine every morning with voice note support.

Everything You Need to Get Fit

A complete fitness solution powered by AI

Custom Workouts

AI generates routines based on your goals and equipment

Diet Plans

Personalized nutrition guidance with calorie tracking

Daily Scheduling

Get your workout delivered every morning at 7 AM

Voice Support

Send voice notes - we'll understand and respond

Progress Tracking

AI monitors your consistency and adjusts plans

Smart Adaptation

Skips and difficulties trigger automatic adjustments

Conversational Fitness

No clunky apps or forms. Just chat naturally with your AI trainer. Tell it what you need, get what you want.

"Give me a 30-minute leg day"
"I'm too tired for cardio today"
"What should I eat after training?"
"Skip tomorrow, doing a marathon"
Trainiq AI
Your personal trainer

Hey! Ready for today's workout? 🏋️

Give me a 30-minute leg day

Perfect! Here's your leg day: 🦵

1. Squats - 4x12
2. Lunges - 3x10 each
3. RDL - 3x12
4. Leg Press - 3x15
